summary: Tested mobile-friendly fixes iteration 2: POS enhancements, Discover View/Manage buttons, Logo upload, Pages in More menu. All 10 features PASSED on mobile viewport (375x812).

minor.issue: WebSocket connection closes before establishment - non-critical for testing

critical_code_review_comments: POSTerminal.jsx has all 12 fast cash buttons: $1, $2, $5, $10, $20, $50, $100, $200, $500, $1K, $5K, $10K
Change due calculator correctly shows 'Change Due: $X.XX' or 'Still Owed: $X.XX' based on cash received vs total
Digital wallet selector includes: Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay, Venmo, PayPal, Cash App, Zelle, GCash, PayMaya, Other
Pages.jsx: handleViewPage navigates to /{slug} (public page), handleManagePage navigates to /member-pages/{pageId}
SettingsTab has Logo Upload section with camera icon, Upload Logo button, and file input for image/*
BottomNav.jsx: moreMenuItems includes Pages entry at index 3 with path '/pages'
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing test page 'Test Store' (mpage_000a72b44296)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features in iteration 138 verified: 1) POS has 12 fast cash buttons ($1-$10K) with [data-testid='fast-cash-{amount}'], change calculator displays correctly, 2) Card payment has amount input [data-testid='card-amount-input'], 3) Digital wallet has amount input [data-testid='digital-wallet-amount-input'] and wallet type dropdown, 4) View button [data-testid='page-view-{id}'] navigates to public page /{slug}, 5) Manage button [data-testid='page-manage-{id}'] only shows for owners and navigates to /member-pages/{pageId}, 6) Follow buttons [data-testid='page-follow-{id}'] visible for non-owned pages, 7) Logo upload in Settings tab has 'Page Logo / Business Icon' section with Upload Logo button, 8) Pages link in More menu [data-testid='more-menu-pages'] navigates to /pages, 9) Bottom padding pb-24 on pages container prevents nav overlap.

pos_change_calculator.behavior: Shows 'Change Due: $X.XX' when cash >= total, 'Still Owed: $X.XX' when cash < total
pos_change_calculator.verified_with: $20 fast cash clicked, showed 'Change Due: $20.00' (cart was empty, total $0)

pos_digital_wallet_input.wallet_selector_options: Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay, Venmo, PayPal, Cash App, Zelle, GCash, PayMaya, Other

pos_card_amount_input.additional_fields: Card Number, MM/YY, CVV, Cardholder Name inputs present

pages_discover_manage_button.visibility: Only visible for page owners/authorized users

page_settings_logo_upload.description: Upload a logo or business icon. It will be displayed on your public page.
page_settings_logo_upload.camera_icon: Camera icon visible as upload trigger

bottom_nav_pages_link.menu_position: 4th item in More menu (after Games, Minted Photos, Community Group)

known_issues.websocket_warning: WebSocket closes before connection established - non-critical, real-time sync feature
known_issues.404_on_some_resources: Some 404 errors in console for non-critical resources
